records.ety: [OE. tretee, F. trait, LL. tractatus; cf. L. tractatus a handling, treatment, consultation, tractate. See Treat, and cf. Tractate.]

defs: The act of treating for the adjustment of differences, as for forming an agreement; negotiation.
quotes: He cast by treaty and by trains Her to persuade.

defs: An agreement so made; specifically, an agreement, league, or contract between two or more nations or sovereigns, formally signed by commissioners properly authorized, and solemnly ratified by the several sovereigns, or the supreme power of each state; an agreement between two or more independent states; as, a treaty of peace; a treaty of alliance.
A proposal tending to an agreement.
